description: Join us for Day 1 of Binance Blockchain Week, where industry leaders discuss the future of blockchain technology, decentralized finance, and NFTs. Featuring keynotes, panels, and a special NFT giveaway.
topic_summary: The event covers the theme 'Building the Future,' focusing on decentralized finance and the latest blockchain technologies. Key discussions include the growth of DeFi and the infrastructure enabling developers to create financial products efficiently. Notable speakers include Sergei Nazarov from Chainlink discussing the evolution of smart contracts and oracles [t=634.91].
